baseline: APF v0.1.0-rc.18 confirmed baseline with M75-M77 improvements
review_scope: representative internal APF nodes and gates

reviews.rationale: Package profile selection and blocking conditions are deterministic and already enforced by explicit gate and confirmation policies.
Gate order changes require authoritative human confirmation; a mini-prompt must not influence or replace that decision.
Atomicity severity, decomposition and blocking behavior are fully specified and machine validated.
Current diagnostics expose severity, path and remediation; additional prompt guidance would duplicate structured evidence.
Assembly, checksum, clean-package and handoff requirements are deterministic and covered by release-hygiene gates.
CSG classification and state protection are runtime policy decisions; an internal mini-prompt must not override enforcement.

claim_boundary: Decision applies to current APF baseline. Reopen only when replay evidence shows repeatable execution variance not solvable by contract, schema, diagnostics or runtime enforcement.
reopen_conditions: same internal node fails in at least two independent replay runs
failure is guidance variance rather than missing contract or runtime defect
contract strengthening has been attempted and documented
process owner explicitly approves candidate review
